prompt: Create a full-body, ultra-realistic formal couple portrait of a young Pakistani man and a young Pakistani woman standing close together like husband and wife, both facing the camera with calm, composed expressions. The man stands on the left wearing a black Pakistani shalwar kameez with subtle silver embroidery around the collar and placket, loose black trousers, and black dress shoes. The woman stands on the right wearing a glossy black saree with an ornate gold embroidered border, a sleeveless black blouse, delicate earrings, and neatly styled long brown hair; one hand rests near her waist while the saree drape falls elegantly to the floor. Set them in a luxurious wedding ballroom with polished white marble flooring, warm cream walls, gold-framed mirrors on both sides, heavy taupe curtains behind them, and a large sparkling crystal chandelier centered above. Include background guests in black and gold formal South Asian attire, plus one photographer on the right holding a camera, all softly blurred to keep focus on the couple. Use warm indoor lighting, symmetrical composition, shallow depth of field, realistic skin and fabric texture, full HD quality, vertical portrait framing, no text, no watermark.
